Pet Cost Calculator

Estimate the annual cost of pet ownership. Select your pet type and care choices to see a detailed expense breakdown.

FAQ

How much does a dog cost per year?

Dogs cost $1,500-$4,500 per year on average, depending on size, health, and lifestyle choices.

How much does a cat cost per year?

Cats cost $1,000-$2,500 per year on average, generally less than dogs due to lower food and grooming costs.

What are the hidden costs of pet ownership?

Emergency vet bills ($1,000-$5,000), pet deposits/rent ($200-$500/yr), boarding ($25-$75/day), and training classes.
